penalties.description: Video contains only tutorial/instructional content without actual task performance.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed this video shows tutorial/instructional content rather than actual task performance. No timing information, task phases, or completion can be identified. The incomplete_task penalty results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric.

disagreements.claude_value: The video shows tutorial content and branding screens but no actual task performance or timing information.
disagreements.rationale: Claude's description more accurately reflects that this is tutorial content rather than a timed attempt that reached maximum time.
